description_long: This is a small, rectangular juice carton with a predominantly white background and colorful fruit illustrations on the front, including an orange slice, a lemon, and a carrot, indicating a mixed fruit and vegetable juice. The brand 'Santal' is prominently displayed in blue and white on the front, with the product name 'ACE' and additional green and gold labels highlighting its sustainability and recyclability. The sides of the carton feature detailed product information, including nutritional facts, recycling instructions, and various certification logos. The top of the carton is blue and appears to have a small, sealed drinking spout, typical of single-serve juice cartons. The packaging is slightly crumpled, suggesting it is made from a flexible, laminated material. The overall appearance is vibrant and designed to attract attention, with a focus on environmental messaging and health benefits.
description: A small, rectangular Santal ACE juice carton with colorful fruit illustrations and prominent branding, featuring eco-friendly and nutritional labels.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the carton with green sustainability messaging, recycling symbols, and a list of environmental benefits.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the fruit illustrations (orange, lemon, carrot) and part of the product information, with a visible seam running down the side.
description_view_2: This view displays the back of the carton, showing detailed nutritional information and a blue top with a sealed spout.
description_view_3: The front of the carton is visible here, featuring the Santal brand, ACE product name, and vibrant fruit illustrations.
